_comment: Single source of truth for the gateway. Prefer the scripts (add-scope.sh / remove-scope.sh / set-box-ip.sh) or the dashboard over hand-editing; if you do edit by hand, run scripts/apply-config.sh afterwards. Schema is documented in scripts/fleet_config.py. gateway.backbone is the fleet's network (the shared lab LAN 10.10.0.0/24 since the 2026-07 migration off the old isolated 192.168.50.0/24); microscope 'host' IPs must fall inside backbone.subnet and not collide with other lab devices. gateway.wifi.iface is left empty to auto-detect the radio (set it only to override on a multi-radio gateway). gateway.wifi.mode is the desired single-radio Wi-Fi mode: 'ap' = run a hotspot laptops connect to (no internet), 'client' = join an external Wi-Fi for internet (needed for image rebuilds).
